title: 42 Crystal
body:
Makes Crystal 42 brother.
## 42? What is it?
On one of the streams at the end of 2023, Baranov was reviewing a fragment of a film based on the novel "The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy" and voiced the phrase with unexpected enthusiasm: "Ah, forty-two, brothers! Kemerovo region, forty-two, forty-two, brothers! Uh-uh!"
### 42, bro?
Firstly, the number 42 is associated with the answer to "the main question of life, the universe and everything else" — this idea was formulated in the series of science fiction comedy novels by Douglas Adams "The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy" [2]. Secondly, the mention of the Kemerovo region is associated with the telephone code of this region, which adds a local flavor and an element of irony [3]. Thus, "42, brother" is not just a random combination of numbers and words, but a symbol of uniting fans, for whom this phrase has become a kind of sign of belonging and a way to express their individuality in the digital space.
